daily.today_energy: Your intuition is firing on all cylinders today, Scorpio. Trust those gut feelings—they're basically your superpower right now. Something's shifting in your favor, so lean into it.
daily.love: Vulnerability is your love language today. If you've been holding back with someone, this is the moment to show up authentically. Real connections happen when you drop the walls.
daily.career: Your natural magnetism is working overtime. This is prime time to pitch ideas, network, or have that conversation you've been putting off. Your energy is undeniable.
daily.health: Your body's asking for deeper rest and grounding. Move how it feels good—whether that's dancing, stretching, or just being still. Listen to what your energy needs.

weekly.overview: This week brings a cosmic reset for you, Scorpio. Mercury's shift is giving you permission to shed old narratives and step into your next chapter. Trust the momentum—something's brewing beneath the surface that'll surprise you.
weekly.love: Your vibe is magnetic right now, but real talk: listen more than you speak. Someone close is trying to show you something vulnerable. Meeting them halfway opens doors you didn't know existed.
weekly.career: The energy around your work is shifting from stagnant to intentional. This is a good week to pitch that idea or have the conversation you've been sitting on. Your clarity is your superpower.
weekly.health: Your body's asking you to slow down and actually feel things instead of just powering through. Whether it's stretching, dancing, or just breathing—movement that feels good is movement that heals right now.
